summary: Iteration 8 full-stack test of (1) geocoding fix on seeded route 4fca5350-ddf4-40cb-8028-aae36f8d257d and (2) chase-camera follow mode on the navigate screen. BACKEND (pytest 5/5 PASS on /app/backend/tests/test_geocoding.py): GET /api/routes/{id} returns 104 stops with 74 unique (round-4) lat/lng tuples (>=50 required) ✓; stop order=1 'Andrzeja Antosiewicza 1' at lat 53.4412 (~53.441) ✓; stop order=2 '1 Maja 7/7' at lat 53.4410 (~53.441) lng 14.5657 (~14.566) ✓; <5 stops at the old Gemini-hallucinated centre 53.4285/14.5528 ✓. FRONTEND visual (route page /route/{id}): route-map iframe present, 104 leaflet markers with 70 unique transforms — pins SCATTERED across Szczecin (not stacked) ✓ — geocoding fix confirmed visually. FRONTEND chase-camera test: NOTE the requested stop b705e21d is currently status=delivered so renders 'Następny punkt' instead of start-nav-btn; substituted with pending stop 9a8309fb-8084-403c-b697-d34a97d0a6f9 (order 3). With Playwright context.grant_permissions(['geolocation']) + set_geolocation(53.441, 14.576): (a) compass-bar appears after tap start-nav-btn with '87 m / W lewo • Teofila Firlika' ✓, (b) recenter-btn visible with backgroundColor rgb(230,51,41) === colors.primary (iconBtnActive ON) ✓, (c) .pin-user blue-arrow CSS triangle visible inside navigate-map iframe ✓, (d) leaflet tile zoom level jumped from 12 (initial fitBounds) to 17 (street-level chase view) ✓, recenter-btn toggle OFF → bg becomes transparent rgba(0,0,0,0) ✓, toggle ON again → bg returns to red ✓, stop-nav-btn → ZERO console errors, ZERO page errors, ZERO LocationEventEmitter/removeSubscription substrings, compass-bar removed from DOM, start-nav-btn re-appears ✓. The iter-6 web-shim cleanup crash is also confirmed still fixed in this run. Lingering deprecation warning carried over from iter 6/7: 'shadow*' style props (non-blocking).

react_native_issues.component: navigate.tsx styles (compassRow / topBarRow / bottom / startBtn) & route page
react_native_issues.issue: Runtime deprecation warning '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' still emitted on both /route/{id} and /route/{id}/stop/{stopId}/navigate. Reference: /app/frontend/app/route/[id]/stop/[stopId]/navigate.tsx (compassRow/topBarRow/bottom/startBtn style blocks) — non-blocking, carried over from iter 6/7.

action_items: Optional cleanup: migrate remaining shadow* props in navigate.tsx (and any other screen with shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset) to the cross-platform 'boxShadow' string. Pre-existing — not in scope of this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: NavigateMap.tsx is well-architected: static HTML keyed on target.id keeps the leaflet map alive while user/heading/polyline updates stream via postMessage (web) / injectJavaScript (native). The follow branch correctly clamps zoom to >=17 and only rotates bearing when leaflet-rotate is available. Good defensive try/catch around setBearing.

Recenter toggle implementation at navigate.tsx:329-336 is conditionally rendered on (navigating && user) which is correct UX, but mind that if the user revokes geolocation mid-trip the button vanishes — currently acceptable.
Confirmed iter-7 fix at navigate.tsx:148-169 still in place; this iteration's start/stop cycle produced zero LocationEventEmitter errors.

success_rate.frontend: 9/9 chase-camera sub-checks pass: start visible ✓, compass appears ✓, recenter present ✓, follow-ON red bg ✓, pin-user blue arrow ✓, zoom 12→17 street-level ✓, toggle OFF transparent ✓, toggle ON red again ✓, stop clean teardown with 0 errors ✓

seed_data_creation: None. Reused seeded route 4fca5350-ddf4-40cb-8028-aae36f8d257d (re-geocoded via POST /api/routes/{id}/regeocode by main agent earlier). Substituted pending stop 9a8309fb (order 3) for the requested b705e21d which is currently delivered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stop b705e21d (Antosiewicza 1, order 1) is delivered — it renders 'Następny punkt' instead of start-nav-btn. For future navigate-screen tests on this route, use any of the pending stops (e.g. 9a8309fb order 3, 84f46d8e order 4, c5d5a18b order 5). The chase-camera follow detection signal is: backgroundColor of [data-testid="recenter-btn"] == rgb(230, 51, 41) (colors.primary) when follow=ON, transparent when OFF. Zoom detection trick: read the URL of any '.leaflet-tile' inside the navigate-map iframe — z is parts[-3]; pre-start fitBounds gives ~z=12, follow-ON gives z>=17. pin-user is a CSS triangle (border-bottom:24px solid #1E88E5), use frame.query_selector('.pin-user').
rca_of_issue: BUG 1 RCA (geocoding): Previously Gemini was asked to return lat/lng and hallucinated the same Szczecin city-centre 53.4285/14.5528 for every address. Replaced with Photon (photon.komoot.io) primary + Nominatim fallback inside upload + a new POST /api/routes/{id}/regeocode endpoint that re-geocodes existing data. Verified 74 distinct rounded coords out of 104 stops with stop-1 and stop-2 anchored to expected real-world positions. FEATURE 2 (chase-camera): NavigateMap.tsx rewritten — static HTML + postMessage streaming, leaflet-rotate plugin for bearing, new follow prop, expo-location.watchHeadingAsync for compass. Verified follow mode zoom-snap (12→17), recenter toggle, and clean tear-down with no expo-location web-shim regressions.
